headline: Gentherm Named a 2025 Supplier of the Year by General Motors
summary: NOVI, Mich., May 26, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Gentherm (NASDAQ: THRM) a global market leader of innovative thermal management and pneumatic comfort technologies, has been presented with a 2025 Supplier of the Year Award at General Motors’ 34th annual Supplier of the Year event in Austin, Texas. This marks the fourth time Gentherm has received this recognition. “Being named a GM Supplier of the Year is a meaningful recognition of the collaboration and shared focus that define our partnership,” sa
